name: BaMo Ads - Generate Video (Creatomate)
description: Receives video generation request, fetches listing data (incl. agent_photo_url) or uses manual input, maps to Creatomate template modifications, starts render, creates a creative_job for async tracking.

parameters.jsonBody: ={{ JSON.stringify({ template_id: $("Video Request Webhook").item.json.body.template_id, modifications: { "Photo-1.source": $json.photo1, "Photo-2.source": $json.photo2, "Photo-3.source": $json.photo3, "Photo-4.source": $json.photo4, "Photo-5.source": $json.photo5, "Address.text": $json.address, "Details-1.text": $json.details1, "Details-2.text": $json.details2, "Picture.source": $json.agentPhoto, "Name.text": $json.agentName, "Email.text": $json.agentEmail, "Phone-Number.text": $json.agentPhone, "Brand-Name.text": $json.brandName, ...($("Video Request Webhook").item.json.body.music_url ? { "Music.source": $("Video Request Webhook").item.json.body.music_url } : {}) }, webhook_url: "https://n8n-bahaymo.onrender.com/webhook/bamo-video-complete" }) }}

={{ JSON.stringify({ client_id: $("Video Request Webhook").item.json.body.client_id, creative_id: null, job_id: $json.id, job_type: "creatomate_video", request_payload: { template_id: $("Video Request Webhook").item.json.body.template_id, prompt_id: $("Video Request Webhook").item.json.body.prompt_id }, status: "processing" }) }}

parameters.responseBody: ={{ JSON.stringify({ success: true, creatomate_render_id: $("Start Creatomate Render").item.json.id, status: "processing", message: "Video render started" }) }}

parameters.jsonBody: ={{ JSON.stringify({ template_id: $("Video Request Webhook").item.json.body.template_id, modifications: { "Photo-1.source": $json.photo1, "Photo-2.source": $json.photo2, "Photo-3.source": $json.photo3, "Photo-4.source": $json.photo4, "Photo-5.source": $json.photo5, "Address.text": $json.address, "Details-1.text": $json.details1, "Details-2.text": $json.details2, "Picture.source": $json.agentPhoto, "Name.text": $json.agentName, "Email.text": $json.agentEmail, "Phone-Number.text": $json.agentPhone, "Brand-Name.text": $json.brandName, ...($("Video Request Webhook").item.json.body.music_url ? { "Music.source": $("Video Request Webhook").item.json.body.music_url } : {}) }, webhook_url: "https://n8n-bahaymo.onrender.com/webhook/bamo-video-complete" }) }}

={{ JSON.stringify({ client_id: $("Video Request Webhook").item.json.body.client_id, creative_id: null, job_id: $json.id, job_type: "creatomate_video", request_payload: { template_id: $("Video Request Webhook").item.json.body.template_id, prompt_id: $("Video Request Webhook").item.json.body.prompt_id }, status: "processing" }) }}

parameters.responseBody: ={{ JSON.stringify({ success: true, creatomate_render_id: $("Start Creatomate Render").item.json.id, status: "processing", message: "Video render started" }) }}
